title: OpenAI/Anthropic-compatible /v1 gateway
description: Workspace-bound `sk-rr-` API keys + a /v1/chat/completions + /v1/models endpoint so any OpenAI-compatible tool (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex) can point at a workspace. Thin proxy over callForUser. Non-streaming + pseudo-stream in v0.1 (real streaming + /v1/messages next).
